info.name: GoGo API Collection
info.description: Generated collection of APIs for the GoGo Monorepo API module.

request.description:
Handler: authController.register
Auth: Public
Validation: createUserSchema

Handler: authController.loginUser
Auth: Public
Validation: loginUserSchema

Handler: authController.loginUser
Auth: Public
Validation: loginUserSchema

Handler: authController.changePassword
Auth: Authenticated
Validation: changePasswordSchema

Handler: authController.changePassword
Auth: Authenticated
Validation: changePasswordSchema

Handler: userController.createUser
Auth: Authenticated (Roles: Admin)
Validation: CreateUserSchema

Handler: userController.updateMyProfile
Auth: Authenticated
Upload: profileImage (single)

Handler: userController.updateDriverDocuments
Auth: Authenticated
Upload: emaratesId (1), drivingLicense (1), vehicleRegistration (1)

Handler: userController.updateUser
Auth: Authenticated (Roles: Admin)
Upload: profileImage (single)

Handler: orderController.submitCompletionProof
Auth: Authenticated
Upload: images (single)
